title: From simplification to implementation – Boosting competitiveness and productivity across the EU [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: The European Commission is committed to making EU legislation more efficient and easier to implement, aiming to reduce administrative burdens by 25% overall and 35% for SMEs. This agenda is central to the Commission’s efforts to strengthen competitiveness and deliver benefits for citizens and businesses. To achieve these objectives, the Commission has already introduced a […]
